task_completion.description: Access the patient record or billing section for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the application open to the profile, billing, or invoice creation screen for patient 'Maria Santos' (ID: P00003).

task_completion.description: Add 'X-Ray - Chest PA' to the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'X-Ray - Chest PA' listed as a line item on the draft or final invoice.

task_completion.description: Add 'Office Visit - Level 3' to the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Office Visit - Level 3' listed as a line item on the draft or final invoice.

task_completion.description: Ensure the quantity for both items is exactly 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quantity field next to both 'X-Ray - Chest PA' and 'Office Visit - Level 3' displays '1'.

task_completion.description: Save the invoice and ensure it is associated with the patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a success notification for the saved invoice, a finalized invoice view (not editable), or the invoice listed under the billing/records tab for Maria Santos.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to create the invoice.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web or desktop EMR/billing application, not terminal windows using curl or database scripts to inject data.

integrity.description: The invoice was created in the actual billing system, not mocked up in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is a functional application with navigation menus, buttons, and forms, not a plain text editor like Notepad or TextEdit.

integrity.description: The invoice was genuinely saved within the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for system-generated confirmation messages, a change in UI state from 'draft' to 'saved/final', or the invoice appearing in a persistent list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Patient ID: P00003. The invoice must contain exactly two items: 'X-Ray - Chest PA' (Quantity: 1, Expected Price: 125.00) and 'Office Visit - Level 3' (Quantity: 1, Expected Price: 250.00). The invoice must be saved and linked to this specific patient.
